name: Splunk SOAR Platform MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for Splunk-side SOAR integration readiness.
author: splunk-soar-setup skill

tools.name: soar_app_health
tools.title: SOAR App Health
tools.description: Check Splunk-side SOAR apps and add-ons installed on the search tier.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=splunk_app_soar OR title=phantom OR title=Splunk_App_SOAR OR title=TA-splunk-soar OR title=splunk_app_soar_export OR title=Splunk App for SOAR Export | table title label version disabled visible configured state | sort title

tools.name: soar_export_app_state
tools.title: SOAR Export App State
tools.description: Check the Splunk App for SOAR Export and export-related saved searches.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/saved/searches count=0 | search eai:acl.app=splunk_app_soar_export OR title=*SOAR* OR title=*Phantom* | table title eai:acl.app disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule action.* | sort title

tools.name: soar_visible_inputs_indexes
tools.title: SOAR Visible Inputs And Indexes
tools.description: List SOAR-related local inputs visible to the search head.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/data/inputs/all count=0 | search title=*soar* OR title=*phantom* OR eai:acl.app=*soar* OR eai:acl.app=*phantom* | table title eai:acl.app disabled index sourcetype interval | sort title

tools.name: soar_visible_indexes
tools.title: SOAR Visible Indexes
tools.description: List SOAR and Phantom related indexes visible to the Splunk search tier.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=*soar* OR title=*phantom* | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB splunk_server | sort title

tools.name: soar_placement_warnings
tools.title: SOAR Placement Warnings
tools.description: Show server roles and SOAR app placement signals useful for deployment review.
tools.spl: | rest /services/server/info | table serverName server_roles guid version health_info
